title: The 10 Best Dividend Stocks of All Time
text: Any discussion regarding the best dividend stocks of all time often starts with the Dividend Aristocrats. They are S&P 500 companies that have increased their annual dividend payment for at least 25 consecutive years.

title: Hormel Foods Recognized Again for Leading Internship Program
text: AUSTIN, Minn. , Oct. 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE: HRL), a Fortune 500 global branded food company, announced today its internship program has been honored once again, having been named in the 2023 Vault Best Internships ranking.

title: Hormel Foods Recognized by Investor's Business Daily on 100 Best ESG Companies List
text: AUSTIN, Minn. , Oct. 24, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE: HRL), a Fortune 500 global branded food company, was ranked for the first time on the Investor's Business Daily annual report of the 100 Best ESG Companies.

title: Capacity Expansion Aids Hormel Foods (HRL), High Costs Ail
text: Hormel Foods (HRL) is on track with strategic investments to boost capacity. However, rising cost inflation is a concern.

title: Hormel Foods Appoints Scott Aakre as Senior Vice President of Brand Fuel
text: Hormel Foods Establishing New Brand Fuel Center of Excellence to Support Iconic and Emerging Portfolio of Brands Aakre Continues to Lead Global Innovation and Insights AUSTIN, Minn. , Oct. 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE: HRL), a Fortune 500 global branded food company, today announced the appointment of Scott Aakre as senior vice president of Brand Fuel, the company's newest center of excellence focused on consumer insights and innovation for its portfolio of more than 30 leading brands.

title: Hormel Foods Appoints Katie Larson as Senior Vice President of Human Resources
text: AUSTIN, Minn. , Oct. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE: HRL), a Fortune 500 global branded food company, today announced the appointment of Katie Larson as senior vice president of human resources.

title: 2 Dividend Kings Outperforming the S&P 500 Index
text: The Dividend King index is a collection of just 45 companies with at least 50 consecutive years of dividend growth. These companies have raised payments to shareholders through multiple recessions, showing the strength of their respective business models.

title: Hormel Is Boring, Hormel Is Attractive
text: While Hormel Foods Corporation's quarterly organic net sales growth has slowed in the recent quarters, the firm has still managed to reach a record net sales of $3.0 billion in Q2. Despite the decline in export volumes, the demand for Hormel's products remains high.
